package.brief: HH the Amir Sheikh Tamim bin Hamad Al Thani received HE Mr Shehbaz Sharif, Prime Minister of Pakistan, at the Amiri Diwan on Saturday to review bilateral relations and discuss regional developments.

article.headline: HH the Amir Receives Pakistani Prime Minister at Amiri Diwan
article.body:
HH Sheikh Tamim bin Hamad Al Thani received HE Mr Shehbaz Sharif, Prime Minister of the Islamic Republic of Pakistan, at the Amiri Diwan on Saturday.

The talks reviewed bilateral relations between the two countries and ways to expand cooperation. Regional developments in the Middle East were also discussed.

package.instagram_caption: HH the Amir Sheikh Tamim bin Hamad Al Thani received HE Mr Shehbaz Sharif, Prime Minister of Pakistan, at the Amiri Diwan on Saturday. The meeting reviewed bilateral relations and discussed regional developments. #Qatar #Pakistan #Diplomacy #AmiriDiwan

package.brief: Mathaf: Arab Museum of Modern Art has opened a new exhibition titled 'Resolutions' to mark 15 years since the museum's establishment, Qatar Museums announced.

article.headline: Mathaf Opens 'Resolutions' Exhibition Marking 15 Years of the Museum
article.body:
Mathaf: Arab Museum of Modern Art has opened a new exhibition titled 'Resolutions' to mark 15 years since the museum's establishment, Qatar Museums announced.

The exhibition runs from 10 June and is on display at the museum in Education City. According to the museum, 'Resolutions' examines Mathaf's foundation through four defining areas: its origins under Sheikh Hassan bin Mohammed bin Ali Al Thani, its exhibition history since opening in 2010, its engagement with knowledge circulation in the Arab world, and its educational programmes.

The museum said the show draws on works from its permanent collection. Entry is free for all visitors, and Qatar Museums said accompanying public talks and guided tours will be held during the exhibition period.

package.instagram_caption: Mathaf: Arab Museum of Modern Art has opened 'Resolutions', a new exhibition celebrating 15 years of the museum. Explore the foundation of Mathaf through its origins, exhibition history, knowledge circulation, and educational programmes. Free entry at Education City. #Mathaf #QatarMuseums #ResolutionsExhibition #ModernArt #Doha #Culture

package.brief: The Ministry of Public Health (MoPH) has launched a summer mosquito-control programme deploying drones and biological fish-based larvicide across 18 districts, coordinated with the Ministry of Municipality and running through October.

article.headline: MoPH Launches Summer Mosquito-Control Programme Using Drones and Biological Larvicide
article.body: The Ministry of Public Health (MoPH) has launched a summer mosquito-control programme across 18 districts, deploying drones and biological fish-based larvicide to control mosquito populations. The initiative is coordinated with the Ministry of Municipality and will run through October. According to MoPH's Director of Communicable Diseases, public-health vigilance during summer is a shared responsibility.

package.instagram_caption: The Ministry of Public Health has launched a summer mosquito-control programme using drones and biological fish-based larvicide across 18 districts. The initiative runs through October in coordination with the Ministry of Municipality. #Qatar #PublicHealth #MosquitoControl #SummerSafety #MoPH

package.brief: The Qatar Education Leadership Expo 2026 concluded in Doha on 24 May, featuring sessions on school leadership, digital learning, and student wellbeing for school leaders, educators, and officials.

article.headline: Qatar Education Leadership Expo 2026 Concludes in Doha
article.body:
The Qatar Education Leadership Expo 2026 concluded in Doha on 24 May, organisers said.

The event brought together school leaders, educators and education-sector officials over its run.

Organisers said the programme featured sessions on school leadership, digital learning and student wellbeing.

The expo has now ended and is no longer accepting registrations.

package.brief: Qatar Airways will resume flights to Helsinki, Finland, and Tokyo Haneda, Japan from 15 July, expanding its network to over 160 destinations this summer.

article.headline: Qatar Airways to Resume Flights to Helsinki and Tokyo Haneda from July 15
article.body:
Qatar Airways has announced the resumption of flights to Helsinki, Finland, and Tokyo Haneda, Japan, effective 15 July.

The Helsinki route will operate four times weekly, increasing to daily from 1 August. Tokyo Haneda will receive four weekly flights starting 15 July, complementing the existing Tokyo Narita service.

This expansion brings Qatar Airways' global network to over 160 destinations this summer, according to the airline.

package.instagram_caption: Qatar Airways is expanding its network! Starting 15 July, flights to Helsinki and Tokyo Haneda resume, bringing the total destinations to over 160 this summer. ✈️ #QatarAirways #Helsinki #TokyoHaneda #TravelQatar #AviationNews #NetworkExpansion
